'''Blalock''' was a male [[Near-Human]] who was in charge of security for [[Abek's Station]], a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] run by the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] criminal [[Nim Abek]]. He was a blocky [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] with leathery, bluish skin and a bald head.

{{Char-stub}}
